name: Transglobal Management Group, Inc.
business: Transglobal Management Group, Inc. (TMGI) is an emerging direct-to-consumer firm with two operating segments: Broadcast, which operates a syndicated radio network (Music of Your Life) that sells advertising time to national and local advertisers, and Health and Beauty, which sells skincare and supplement products under the Whim brand through its webstore, Amazon, and Public Square.

exposures.sentence: Whim is a rising health and beauty brand committed to delivering high-quality, safe, and effective health and beauty products, formulated through a fusion of Nature, Nutrition, and Science.
Music of Your Life produces and delivers radio programming to affiliated AM, FM, and HD radio stations across the country and around the world over the internet.
We sell these products from our webstore at simplywhim.com and are currently in the process of launching our Amazon Marketplace and Public Square online stores.

catalysts.event: Add affiliated radio stations with monthly payment schedule
catalysts.sentence: Our goal for 2025 and forward is to grow our affiliate network by implementing a competitively priced, monthly fee-based service for terrestrial radio stations.

catalysts.event: Acquire controlling interest in Simply Whim
catalysts.sentence: We intend to acquire a controlling interest in Simply Whim in the coming fiscal year, which will be reflected in future balance sheet calculations.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. radio industry ad revenues forecast to grow from $15.8 billion in 2022 to $16.6 billion in 2027, CAGR 0.9%.
tamClaims.sentence: U.S. radio industry ad revenues are forecast to grow at a modest pace through 2027, according to a new report from PwC.

tamClaims.claim: Global internet radio market valued at $37.10 billion in 2022, expected to reach $72.76 billion by 2029, CAGR 10.1%.
tamClaims.sentence: The global internet radio market was valued at US $37.10 billion in 2022, and it is expected to reach US $72.76 billion by 2029 with a CAGR of 10.1% during the forecast period, according to Inside Radio.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. beauty products industry approximately $172 billion in sales in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2022, this market represented approximately $172 billion in sales, according to forecasted Euromonitor International and IBIS World Inc.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. dietary supplements market $50.91 billion in sales in 2022, expected to grow at CAGR 5.7% from 2023 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2022, this market represented $50.91 billion in sales, according to Grandview Research, and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.7% from 2023 to 2030.
